reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of benchmarks and coherence filters, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links benchmark design, protocol invention, incoherence tolerance, and surreal premises into one evaluative warning.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing evaluation orders and benchmark types on discovery of useful new protocols.
explanation: Coherence-first evaluation may suppress fragmented but genuinely innovative proposals for new ways of observing.
